reasons: Lolita can block Selena's Abyssal Arrow path, directly reducing Selena's strongest pickoff setup.
A blocked arrow greatly lowers Selena's ability to convert fog-of-war pressure into a kill.

proof.summary: Selena wants to start fights with Abyssal Arrow, while Lolita can block the projectile path and protect the target Selena wants to stun.
worksBestWhen: Lolita faces Selena's likely arrow angle.
The team plays behind Lolita when contesting bushes or river paths.
failureCases: Lolita turns shield toward another threat.
Selena waits for shield cooldown before committing.

reasons: Kagura can cleanse Selena's debuff and control setup with Rasho Umbrella Flee.
Kagura can punish Selena after Selena misses Abyssal Arrow, because Selena's threat drops heavily when the arrow is unavailable.

proof.summary: Selena wants one long stun to start a pickoff, while Kagura can cleanse debuffs and reposition with Rasho Umbrella Flee, reducing Selena's stun-conversion value.
worksBestWhen: Kagura saves Skill 2 for Selena arrow or trap-trigger follow-up.
Kagura does not waste cleanse only for poke damage.
failureCases: Selena baits Kagura's Skill 2 before throwing the real arrow.
Kagura is hit while Skill 2 is on cooldown.
Selena chains with teammate crowd control after Kagura uses her cleanse.

reasons: Diggie can protect teammates from Selena's stun follow-up.
Time Journey is especially valuable when Selena's team relies on arrow into instant burst.

proof.summary: Selena wants to convert a stun into burst, while Diggie can remove debuffs from nearby allies and give control immunity plus shield during the danger window.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves Time Journey for Selena's real pickoff attempt.
Diggie stays close enough to the likely target.
failureCases: Selena baits Time Journey with a low-value arrow.
The stunned ally is too far from Diggie.

reasons: Wanwan can instantly remove Selena's stun with Needles in Flowers, reducing Selena's arrow-to-burst conversion.
Wanwan's mobility makes it harder for Selena to finish the follow-up after the cleanse window.

proof.summary: Selena wants to land Abyssal Arrow and convert the stun into trap-mark burst, while Wanwan can remove control effects from herself with Needles in Flowers and reposition before Selena completes the follow-up.
worksBestWhen: Wanwan saves Skill 2 for Abyssal Arrow instead of using it early.
Wanwan reacts quickly after being stunned.
Wanwan avoids walking blindly into trap-heavy bushes.
failureCases: Selena's team bursts Wanwan before she can reset.
Selena baits Wanwan's cleanse first, then re-engages with teammate control.

reasons: Hilda can check bushes and pressure Selena's early roam paths.
Her durability and bush sustain help reduce Selena's trap and arrow fog-of-war value.

proof.summary: Selena wants hidden trap and arrow angles, while Hilda can contest bushes and reduce Selena's free setup space.
worksBestWhen: Hilda checks bushes before squishy teammates walk forward.
failureCases: Selena chains trap and arrow with teammate follow-up.
Hilda's team ignores the vision she opens.
